home.heroSubtitle: Standards change. Regulations shift. Late-stage decisions get expensive. Bespoke research and implementation that turns engineering complexity into defensible decisions — for industrial enterprises that can't afford the wrong answer.
home.ctaSubtitle: Whether you need bespoke research, engineering implementation services, or strategic advisory, we deliver outcomes that matter.
home.serviceOverviewDesc: Spanning the full research and engineering intelligence lifecycle
home.researchCardDesc: Bespoke intelligence across energy, standards, AI, technology scouting, market intelligence, and patent analytics.
home.implCardDesc: Implementation, integration, and consulting services that help engineering organizations extract maximum value from their tools.
home.methodStep1Desc: We define exactly what you need to decide — not a generic brief.
home.methodStep2Desc: Proprietary databases, public datasets, expert networks, and primary interviews.
home.methodStep3Desc: Findings reviewed by someone who has operated in your industry.
home.industriesDesc: Published author, conference speaker, and recognized expert across four major industry verticals
home.faq1Q: How is intelle.io different from Tier-1 consultancies?
home.faq1A: Tier-1 firms staff engagements with junior analysts using templates. We deliver senior-practitioner work end-to-end. Comparable output quality, 30–50% lower cost, and a quarter of the turnaround. The founder has 25+ years across S&P Global, IHS Markit, GE Energy, Accuris (a KKR portfolio company), and Sapient Consulting.
home.faq2Q: Do you serve mid-tier EPCs and scale-ups, or only Fortune 500 NOCs?
home.faq2A: Both. We deliberately serve mid-tier EPCs and industrial scale-ups who need decision-grade intelligence but can't afford Tier-1 fees. NOC innovation arms get the same senior-led work — engagement shape adapts to scope.
home.faq3Q: Where are you based and which markets do you cover?
home.faq3A: Headquartered in Dubai (SparkLab LLC). Primary coverage: GCC (Saudi, UAE, Qatar, Kuwait, Oman, Bahrain) and India. Secondary coverage: global English-language markets where industrial AI, energy transition, or standards work has cross-border relevance.
home.faq4Q: What types of engagements do you take on?
home.faq4A: Two service tracks: Research & Innovation (energy research, standards, industrial AI, technology scouting, market intelligence, patent IP, strategic engagements) and Implementation (Accuris adoption, PLM/ALM, knowledge management, standards advisory). Engagements typically run 2–14 weeks. Lead-gen call is free.
home.faq5Q: Do you have reference engagements we can review?
home.faq5A: Fortune 500 reference engagements with Aramco, ADNOC, Shell, Chevron, Honeywell, Baker Hughes, and GE Energy — available under NDA on request. Public-record credentials include SAE-published research on industrial AI and CERAWeek invited-speaker status.

about.heroPara1: {name} is a brand of {entity}, headquartered in {location}. We combine deep domain expertise with rigorous research to deliver bespoke intelligence that helps organizations navigate complexity and act with confidence.
about.heroPara2: Our team draws on over a decade of direct engagement with the world's largest engineering organizations, national oil companies, and technology providers — understanding the engineering realities behind the numbers, not just the market data.
about.storyPara1: intelle.io was founded by Arnab Ghosh — a practitioner who has spent 25+ years at the intersection of industry, technology, and AI.
about.storyPara2: From Sapient Consulting and GE Energy to Dell-EMC, IHS Markit, S&P Global, and lately Accuris, Arnab has worked across the full arc of enterprise technology — helping organizations in Energy, Aerospace & Defense, and Digital Manufacturing turn complex data into decisions. He has advised Fortune 500 companies including Saudi Aramco, ADNOC, QP, KPC, Boeing, NASA, Shell, and Chevron to name a few, earning his customers' trust for measurable impact.
about.storyPara3: That experience revealed a consistent gap: <emph>enterprises don't just need software or data platforms — they need intelligence.</emph> Someone who understands their context, can research their specific needs, and deliver recommendations they can act on. The global consultancies charge a premium for generic work. The niche analysts lack practitioner depth. And the platform vendors stop at the login screen.
about.storyPara4: intelle.io fills that gap — <emph>practitioner-led, bespoke intelligence</emph> for organizations that need real answers, not polished slide decks.
about.stat25Years: Years at the intersection of industry, technology & AI
about.statFortune500: Clients advised — Aramco, ADNOC, Boeing, NASA, Shell & more
about.stat3Domains: Core domains: Energy, Aerospace & Defense, Digital Manufacturing
about.value1Desc: 11+ years of deep engagement across energy, engineering, and technology sectors. We understand the engineering realities behind the numbers, not just the market data.
about.value2Desc: Every engagement is tailored. No off-the-shelf reports, no generic recommendations. We deliver intelligence designed for your specific decision.
about.value3Desc: We measure success by the decisions our research enables and the outcomes those decisions produce — not the pages we deliver.
about.value4Desc: Our team has built products, sold to enterprises, and operated in the industries we research. We bring practitioner depth, not analyst distance.
about.method1Desc: We start by understanding what you actually need to decide. Not a generic research brief, but a structured scoping of the specific intelligence that will drive your decision.
about.method2Desc: We draw on proprietary databases, public datasets (IEA, IRENA, ISO catalogs, USPTO), expert networks, and primary interviews. Every data point is sourced and verified.
about.method3Desc: Findings are reviewed through the lens of someone who has operated in the industry — not just researched it. This is where generic consulting fails and practitioner-led intelligence excels.
about.method4Desc: We deliver decision-ready intelligence documents, not shelfware. Every deliverable is designed to answer a specific question and enable a specific action.
about.method5Desc: Our relationship doesn't end with the deliverable. We remain available for follow-up questions, updated analysis, and strategic guidance as your situation evolves.
about.engage1Desc: Free, no-obligation 30-minute call to understand your challenge and identify how we can help.
about.engage2Desc: We develop a detailed scope of work, timeline, and fee estimate tailored to your specific needs.
about.engage3Desc: We execute the engagement with iterative check-ins, delivering intelligence on time and on scope.
about.engage4Desc: Post-delivery briefing and ongoing availability for questions, updates, and strategic guidance.
about.leadershipPara: Our founding team brings 25+ years of experience across Sapient, GE Energy, Dell-EMC, IHS Markit, S&P Global, and Accuris — combining deep industry knowledge with enterprise technology and AI expertise to serve clients across energy, aerospace, and manufacturing.
about.highlight1: Published in SAE International on Cognitive AI in engineering
about.highlight2: CERAWeek speaker and ministerial panel moderator
about.highlight4: Recognized for measurable enterprise customer impact across multiple organizations
about.highlight6: AI & ML (UT Austin) | MBA (IIM Kozhikode) | CS (Jadavpur University)
about.networkPara: intelle.io combines senior-level advisory with a network of delivery partners, domain experts, and research capabilities that allow us to scale engagements without sacrificing quality.
about.network1Desc: Engineers available through our offshore delivery partnership for PLM/ALM integration, API development, and large-scale implementation projects.
about.network2Desc: Industry verticals covered through our network of subject matter experts spanning energy, aerospace, medical devices, and manufacturing.
about.network3Desc: Access to proprietary databases, SDO publications, patent offices (USPTO, EPO, WIPO), and institutional research partnerships.
about.network4Desc: Deep familiarity with ISO, IEC, API, ASME, ASTM, MIL-STD, FDA, EU MDR, NACE, and national standards organizations across GCC and beyond.
about.ctaPara: Whether you need bespoke research, engineering consulting, or strategic intelligence — every engagement starts with a free diagnostic call.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: {entity} ("{name}", "we", "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information.
privacyPage.collectBody: We collect information you voluntarily provide through our contact form, including your name, email address, company name, phone number, and message content.
privacyPage.use1: To respond to your inquiries and service requests
privacyPage.use3: To improve our website and services
privacyPage.retentionBody: We retain your personal information only as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected, or as required by law.
privacyPage.securityBody: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, or destruction.
privacyPage.rightsBody: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. To exercise these rights, please contact us at {email}.
privacyPage.thirdPartyBody: We may use third-party services (such as analytics and email providers) that collect and process data on our behalf. These services are bound by their own privacy policies.
privacyPage.changesBody: We may update this policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.
privacyPage.contactBody: For questions about this privacy policy, contact us at {email} or {phone}.

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.intro: These Terms of Service govern your use of the {name} website operated by {entity}.
termsPage.useBody: Our website provides information about our research and engineering intelligence services. By accessing this website, you agree to these terms.
termsPage.ipBody: All content on this website, including text, graphics, logos, and images, is the property of {entity} and is protected by applicable intellectual property laws.
termsPage.liabilityBody: The information provided on this website is for general informational purposes only. {entity} makes no warranties about the accuracy or completeness of this information.
termsPage.confidentialityBody: Any information shared through our contact form or during consultations may be treated as confidential. Specific confidentiality terms will be outlined in individual engagement agreements.
termsPage.governingBody: These terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the United Arab Emirates.
termsPage.contactBody: For questions about these terms, contact us at {email}.

cookiesPage.title: Cookie Policy
cookiesPage.intro: This policy explains how {name} ({entity}) uses cookies and similar technologies.
cookiesPage.whatBody: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help provide a better user experience.
cookiesPage.essentialBody: Required for the website to function properly. These cannot be disabled.
cookiesPage.analyticsBody: We use Google Analytics to understand how visitors interact with our website. These cookies collect anonymous usage data.
cookiesPage.authBody: Used to maintain admin sessions for content management purposes.
cookiesPage.managingBody: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Disabling certain cookies may affect website functionality.
cookiesPage.contactBody: For questions about our cookie policy, contact us at {email}.

settings.adminRoleHint: Admins can create documents, manage members, and assign reviewers.
settings.memberRoleHint: Members can review assignments and read the corpus.
settings.planUpgradeHint: Upgrade for unlimited Iris Q&A, email digests, web push, and the assignment workflow.
settings.currentTier: Currently on the {tier} tier. Upgrade to unlock unlimited Iris Q&A, email digests, web push, and the assignment workflow.
settings.checkoutSuccess: Checkout completed. Your subscription is being provisioned — the tier will update within a few seconds once Stripe's webhook fires. Refresh this page to see the change.
settings.billingOwnersOnly: Only owners and admins can change the billing plan.
settings.billingOwnersOnlyHint: Ask an owner to handle the upgrade. Once it's in place, your account inherits the org's tier automatically.
settings.pendingInvitesCount: {count, plural, one{# pending invite} other{# pending invites}}
settings.teamRolesHint: . Admin roles control who can manage the org and invite others. Functional roles (CCO / EHS Manager / Legal Counsel / ESG Lead / Gov Affairs) live on each user's Footprint and drive their Feed defaults.
settings.addMemberHint: If the email matches an existing intelle.io account they're added immediately. Otherwise Supabase sends a magic-link signup email; once they accept, they're joined to your org with the role you pick below.
settings.viewOnlyNote: You can view this team but only owners and admins can change roles or remove members. To upgrade your role, ask an owner.

search.heading: Ask anything, powered by AI
search.subheading: Ask a question in plain English, paste a citation, or search by keyword — and get an instant, source-cited answer across regulations, policies, news, your company documents and assets.
search.emptyTitle: Ask Iris anything about the corpus.
search.emptyDescription: Compliance-grade answers, citation-anchored to the regulation. Choose your sources above, then click any sample query to see it in action.
search.allSourcesTitle: No source selected — searching every source (regulations, policies & news)
search.companyDocsTitle: Also search your organisation's internal documents
search.assetsTitle: Also search your organisation's assets by name
search.inputPlaceholder: Ask anything, paste a citation, or search keywords…
search.filtersChangedTitle: Filters changed — press Search to apply
search.filtersChangedHint: Filters changed — press Search to apply.
search.folderPickerHelp: Pick folders to search (includes sub-folders). None selected = all company documents.
search.synthesising: Synthesising an answer from the corpus…
search.aiDisclaimer: AI-generated synthesis. Verify every claim against the cited source before relying on it for compliance evidence.
search.corpusMatches: {count, plural, one{# match} other{# matches}} in the corpus
search.corpusEmpty: No corpus rows matched your keywords. Iris may still answer from related items above.
search.companyDocMatches: {count, plural, one{# match} other{# matches}} in your company documents
search.companyDocEmpty: No company documents matched. Try a broader query or widen the folder selection.
search.assetMatches: {count, plural, one{# match} other{# matches}} in your assets
search.assetEmpty: No assets matched that name or code. Try a different term.
search.noPreviewText: No preview text available for this item.
search.savedTitle: Already in your Saved searches — click to refresh the timestamp

monitor.feedSubtitleEmpty: Nothing scored yet — configure your footprint or wait for the matcher.
monitor.feedSubtitle: {total} regulations match your footprint · {critical} critical, {high} high.
monitor.feedNoItemsForFilter: No items match the current filter. Try Severity: “Normal +” or toggle Resolved.
monitor.emptyNoFootprintTitle: Set up your footprint to see what matters to you.
monitor.emptyNoFootprintBody: The Relevance Feed scores every regulation in the corpus against your operations footprint — the jurisdictions, activities, regulators, and topics you actually care about.
monitor.emptyCaughtUpBody: No regulations match your footprint at the current threshold. This can mean: (a) the matcher hasn't run since your last footprint change — give it a minute, (b) your footprint is narrow — broaden it on the settings page, or (c) the corpus genuinely has nothing relevant to you right now.
monitor.bulkMarkAllConfirm: Mark all {count} unseen matches as seen? This clears your bell badge but does NOT resolve the items — they stay in the Feed.
monitor.bulkHighVolumeBody: {count} unseen matches. Bulk-triage actions below help you stay on top.
monitor.briefingNote: Claude Opus is reading the regulation + your footprint to write a 4-section briefing. Don't close this row until it lands.
monitor.savedIntro: Saved corpus queries. Click Run on any row to re-run the search on the current corpus state.
monitor.savedEmpty: No saved searches yet. Run a query on the Search page and click ★ Save this search.
monitor.comingSoonBody: Saved regulations · Saved Feed views · Past impact briefings. Each will roll up into the same My Vantage hub.
monitor.savedDeleteConfirm: Delete saved search "{name}"? This can't be undone.
monitor.matchesAtSave: {count, plural, one {# match at save} other {# matches at save}}
monitor.alertsIntro: Three channels: in-app bell (always on), email digests (opt-in, weekly or daily), and browser push for critical-severity items (opt-in, capped at 3 / 24h). No hourly option — research is clear that hourly compliance email becomes inbox noise within a week.
monitor.testNoMatches: No matches eligible right now. (pulled {pulled}, critical-only left {afterCriticalGate}, after dedup {afterDedup}.) The Preview button skips both filters and shows the layout regardless.
monitor.testSent: Sent — check your inbox for {count, plural, one {# match} other {# matches}}. Subject is prefixed with [TEST]. Those items now won't re-send in the next scheduled digest.
monitor.inAppBody: Always on — the bell in the top nav is the canonical inbox. No opt-out.
monitor.emailBody: Sent via Brevo. Off by default. We never offer hourly — the research is unambiguous that hourly compliance email becomes inbox noise within a week.
monitor.criticalGateBody: When on, the digest only includes matches with severity = Critical (score ≥ 80). Recommended for senior leaders.
monitor.webPushBody: Browser notifications for critical-severity matches. Capped at 3 per 24h to prevent fatigue. Subscribe per browser — the same account can be subscribed on multiple devices.
monitor.webPushOptInTitle: I want browser pushes for CRITICAL matches
monitor.webPushOptInBody: Saves the preference. Use the Subscribe button below to grant browser permission and register this device. The match cron fans out pushes automatically when new critical items land.
monitor.testBody: Preview renders the email HTML in a new tab with no Brevo send. Send test runs the real pipeline scoped to your account — useful for verifying Brevo is configured. Both ignore the scheduled cron.
monitor.testSendNow: Send test to my email now
monitor.brevoBody: If Brevo rejects sends with a 401/403, your Brevo account has IP authorization enabled and Vercel's IPs aren't whitelisted. Vercel function IPs rotate, so the cleanest fix is to <bold>disable IP authorization</bold> in Brevo at <path>Settings → SMTP & API → Authorized IPs</path> (the API key itself remains the auth boundary). Then re-run the test.
monitor.changesTakeEffect: Changes take effect from the next digest cycle.
monitor.pushNoVapidKey: VAPID public key not configured on the server.
monitor.pushPermissionDenied: Browser blocked notifications. Re-enable them in your browser site settings to subscribe.
monitor.pushSubscribed: Subscribed. You'll get a browser notification when critical matches land (capped at 3 per 24h).
monitor.pushUnsubscribed: Unsubscribed. No more browser pushes from this device.
monitor.pushTestSent: Test sent to {count, plural, one {# device} other {# devices}}. You should see a notification within a few seconds.
monitor.pushUnsupported: This browser doesn't support web push. iOS Safari requires installing intelle.io to your Home Screen first.
monitor.pushNoVapid: Web push is partially configured: the server is missing NEXT_PUBLIC_VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY. See the README for the one-time setup.
monitor.pushBlocked: Notifications are blocked for this site. To enable, click the lock icon in your browser address bar, find Notifications, and switch to Allow. Then refresh this page.
monitor.corpusHeroSubtitle: {total} regulations were added or updated in the last 7 days across {jurisdictions} jurisdictions.
monitor.noFootprintHeroTitle: Set a footprint to personalise your recap
monitor.noFootprintHeroSubtitle: Once you define your geographies, activities and topics, this page becomes a weekly digest of the changes that matter to you. Meanwhile, here's what moved across the whole corpus.
monitor.recapHeroSubtitle: {total} regulations match your footprint right now. {unseen} unseen · {deadlines} with a deadline in the next 30 days.
monitor.emptyRecentlyChanged: No recent changes among your matches.
monitor.emptyObligations: No obligations yet — <link>pin a regulation to an asset</link> to start tracking.
monitor.emptyDocuments: No documents yet — <link>author an SOP or policy</link> to get started.
monitor.openComments: {count, plural, one {# open comment} other {# open comments}}
monitor.noCorpusChanges: No changes in the last 7 days.
monitor.signupCtaTitle: Get this weekly — scored to your operations
monitor.signupCtaBody: Define your footprint once and your recap becomes a personalised digest of only the regulations that touch your geographies, activities and assets.

comply.hubSubheading: Reviews, obligations, assets, footprint — the surfaces where compliance work actually happens.
comply.hubInboxDescription: Every document review + obligation review assigned to you across the org.
comply.hubObligationsDescription: Compliance obligations pinned to assets. Set severity, assign reviewers, capture evidence.
comply.hubAssetsDescription: Your operations tree — Org → Division → Site → Facility → Component. Pin obligations and docs.
comply.hubFootprintDescription: Jurisdictions, NAICS, substances, topics — the inputs that score the Relevance Feed.
comply.hubCheckupDescription: 5-question quiz that seeds a sample feed and configures your footprint. Useful for new team members.
comply.hubConnectorRunnerDescription: Manually trigger any publisher connector. Useful right after adding a new publisher (e.g. SASO) — fills the corpus without waiting for the nightly cron. Owner/admin only.
comply.inboxSubheading: Documents and obligations assigned to you across the org. Click any row to open the source for review.
comply.inboxDocReviewsEmpty: No open document reviews assigned to you.
comply.inboxObligationReviewsSubtitle: Compliance obligations awaiting your attestation + evidence.
comply.inboxObligationReviewsEmpty: No open obligation reviews assigned to you.
comply.obligationsSubheading: Each obligation pins one regulation (or clause) to one asset and routes it through review. Admins set severity + compliance status and sign off; reviewers complete the review with evidence.
comply.createObligationDescription: Pick an asset and a regulation; optionally pin to a clause. Severity and compliance status can be revised any time before sign-off — only admins can change them.
comply.obligationsEmpty: No obligations yet for this filter.
comply.evidenceDescription: Upload one or more files supporting your review. Each file is analysed by AI against the regulation and any discrepancies appear inline. You can address them or acknowledge them before submitting for approval.
comply.assetsSubheading: The org's {chain} tree. Used to attach regulations (and specific clauses) to specific assets, then route them to reviewers.
comply.legendClickHint: Click an asset to view its compliance →
comply.noObligationsPinned: No obligations pinned to this asset yet.
comply.noDocumentsLinked: No internal documents linked. Open a document and use the “Linked assets” panel to attach.
comply.setupSubheading: Start with at least one {l2}. Add {l3}s, {l4}s, and {l5}s under it, or seed an industry starter pack from the right rail.
comply.setupReadOnly: Only owners and admins can edit the asset tree. You can view the current tree at <link>/regwatch/assets</link>.
comply.footprintSubheading: Tells Vantage which jurisdictions, activities, substances, regulators, and topics to score against. Save as often as you like — changes propagate to your Relevance Feed automatically.
comply.errKickbackNotes: Provide kick-back notes for the reviewer
comply.errSignoffAcknowledge: Tick the acknowledgement box to confirm you've reviewed the AI-flagged discrepancies
comply.adminGradingHint: These fields are locked to owners and admins. The reviewer sees them but cannot edit.
comply.dialogCompleteReviewBody: The obligation moves to pending-approval; an admin signs off to verify. Evidence files are managed in the Evidence section above — make sure at least one file is uploaded before submitting.
comply.dialogKickbackBody: Send back to the reviewer with notes on what needs to be revised. State returns to in-review.
comply.dialogSignOffBody: Sign-off is recorded with your identity, timestamp, and rationale. The rationale is stored on the obligation and in the audit history.
comply.dialogNotApplicableBody: Mark as Not Applicable with a rationale. The obligation is terminal (no further review).
comply.dialogReopenBody: Re-opening clears the workflow state back to open. The audit history will record this with your identity.
comply.unacknowledgedFindings: {count, plural, one {# AI-flagged discrepancy not yet acknowledged} other {# AI-flagged discrepancies not yet acknowledged}}
comply.signoffAcknowledgeCheckbox: I have reviewed these AI-flagged discrepancies and am proceeding with sign-off despite them being unacknowledged.
comply.signoffRationalePlaceholder: Sign-off rationale (required) — what was reviewed, why this status, any caveats.
comply.notApplicablePlaceholder: Why is this not applicable to the asset?
comply.dropzoneTitle: Drop evidence files here, or click to choose
comply.dropzoneHint: Documents (PDF / DOCX / TXT), images (JPG / PNG / HEIC / WEBP), or video (MP4 / MOV, mobile-recorded). Each file is analysed against the regulation in the background — findings appear inline.
comply.deleteEvidenceDescription: Delete {fileName}? This can't be undone. The file and its AI analysis will be removed permanently.
comply.openFileTooltip: Open this evidence file in a new tab (signed URL valid for 60 seconds)
comply.rerunAnalysisTooltip: Re-queue this file for AI analysis. Use after fixing the source file or when prior analysis failed.
comply.deleteFileTooltip: Delete this evidence file and its AI analysis permanently
comply.videoUnsupported: Your browser does not support inline video. Use Open file ↗ above.
comply.keyframesAnalysed: {count, plural, one {# keyframe analysed} other {# keyframes analysed}}
comply.aiWarningHeading: ⚠ AI-generated analysis — verify before relying on it
comply.aiWarningBody: The summary and findings below were produced by an AI model from the uploaded {kind}. They can miss or misread evidence and are <underline>not a compliance determination</underline>. A qualified reviewer must evaluate them before they inform any sign-off.
comply.noDiscrepancies: No discrepancies detected. The evidence aligns with the regulation as far as the AI can tell.
comply.acknowledgePlaceholder: Optional: explain how you've addressed this, or why it's acceptable.
comply.dictateTooltip: Dictate your note — recorded audio is transcribed (any language → English) into the box below
comply.humanEvalPlaceholder: Type your assessment, or tap Record to dictate it — do you agree with the AI? Add context, corrections, or the decision a reviewer should act on.
comply.lightTitleRed: Open compliance item — non-compliant or critical
comply.treeEmpty: No assets configured yet. Use <link>Setup</link> to add a Site or import a starter pack.
comply.drawerAllAddressed: {count, plural, one {# obligation · all addressed} other {# obligations · all addressed}}
comply.archiveAssetConfirm: Archive "{name}"? This hides it from the tree but preserves obligations attached to it.
comply.seedDescription: Type a comma-separated list of {label} names to seed under. Available: {available}
comply.builderEmpty: No assets yet. Start with a {label} above, or seed an industry starter pack from the right rail.
comply.starterPacksHint: Seed L3 + L4 nodes under one or more {label}s. Pick the taxonomy closest to your operations.
comply.archiveNodeTooltip: Archive "{name}" — hides it from the tree but preserves obligations attached to it
comply.fpRoleDescription: Drives default Feed filters and onboarding suggestions. You can change this later.
comply.fpGeographyDescription: Pick every country whose regulations might apply to your operations.
comply.fpActivitiesDescription: Which industrial activities does your org operate? Use the filter to narrow the list.
comply.fpSubstancesDescription: Substances you handle, store, or release. CAS-formatted IDs only.
comply.fpRegulatorsDescription: Pre-selected from your geography choices won't be automatic in Phase 1.1 — pick the ones whose feeds you want to follow.
comply.fpTopicsDescription: Topic domains worth tracking — used to score relevance once Phase 1.2 matching is live.
comply.configurationChoices: {count, plural, one {# configuration choice.} other {# configuration choices.}}
comply.nothingConfigured: Nothing configured yet — pick a few items above.
comply.noNaicsMatch: No NAICS codes match the filter

discover.heading: {total} regulations · {recent} updated this month
discover.subheading: Every regulation in the corpus, organised by jurisdiction and publisher hierarchy — same way the publishers themselves organise their codes. No signup required to read. Updates are marked but never gating: the full code is always browsable.
discover.landingHeading: Know which regulations actually matter — for <highlight>your operations.</highlight>
discover.landingSubheading: Vantage monitors {count} regulators across global energy, environmental, industrial, and chemical jurisdictions, scores each change against your operations footprint, and delivers a 4-section impact briefing — citation-grounded, mobile-readable, no sales call required.
discover.regulatorsItemsCount: {regulators, plural, one {# regulator} other {# regulators}} · {items} items
discover.regulatorsSubheading: Every regulator Vantage monitors today, grouped by region. Click a card for the full per-regulator feed of items. Public corpus — no signup required to read.
discover.regulatorsCta: Want a regulator we're not monitoring yet? <link>Tell us</link> — most are a single connector away.
discover.regulatorEmptyTitle: No items tracked for this regulator yet.
discover.regulatorEmptyDescription: The next crawl cron run will populate items here. If this regulator has no automated connector, items are added via the seed migration or manual entry.
discover.publishersRegulationsCount: {publishers, plural, one {# publisher} other {# publishers}} · {regulationsLabel} {regulations, plural, one {regulation} other {regulations}}
discover.topicsHeading: Every topic we track, <highlight>curated for compliance</highlight>
discover.topicsSubheading: {count} curated topic domains spanning climate, disclosure, safety, chemicals, and trade. Click any topic to see every regulation in our corpus that touches it.
discover.topicCoverage: {total} topic-tag attributions across the corpus · {recent} in the last 30 days

reporting.label: Reporting & disclosure
reporting.description: Sustainability, climate-related, and financial disclosure rules.

discover.otherTopicsDescription: Topics attached by publisher connectors, beyond the curated domains above.
discover.topicsCta: Want a topic we're not tracking? <link>Tell us</link> — we add new topics as taxonomy entries plus enrichment-prompt updates.
discover.topicDetailSubheading: Every regulation in the Vantage corpus tagged with <mono>{slug}</mono>. Items are tagged by the enrichment cron once they land, plus any topic attribution the connector pre-populates.
discover.topicEmptyDescription: The next crawl + enrichment cycle will populate items here as Claude Haiku tags incoming regulations with this topic.
discover.browseSubheading: {recent} updated in the last 30 days. Public corpus — no signup required to read.
discover.corpusEmptyDescription: Apply the seed migration at supabase/migrations/20260605_regwatch_regulator_seed.sql, or wait for Phase 1.x connectors to start writing regulators + items.
discover.noMatchDescription: Try clearing the most restrictive facet, or widen the date range.
discover.noMatchWithQuery: Try a broader search than "{q}", or clear a facet from the sidebar.
discover.noMatchSimpleDescription: Try clearing a facet or broadening your search.
discover.showingRange: Showing {start}–{end} of {total} {count, plural, one {regulation} other {regulations}}{hasQuery, select, yes { for <highlight>“{q}”</highlight>} other {}}
discover.jurisdictionStats: {regulators} regulators · {regulations} regulations · <accent>{recent} updated in the last 30 days</accent>
discover.treeIntro: Click any row to expand. Amber dot indicates recent updates.
discover.treeUpdatesOnly: Show only sections with recent updates
discover.treeEmptyUpdates: No sections in this jurisdiction have updates in the last 30 days.
discover.treeEmptyNoHierarchy: No hierarchy has been ingested for this jurisdiction yet. Run /api/cron/regwatch-hierarchy.
discover.treeUpdatedWithLastChange: Updated within the last 30 days (last change {date})
discover.treeNoUpdates: No updates in the last 30 days
discover.hideNewsHint: Excludes regulator press releases. On by default.
discover.noExtractedBody: No extracted body yet. Switch to the Original tab to view the source PDF / HTML directly.
discover.sourceCanonicalNote: Canonical document at the regulator. Always cite this URL — not the Vantage detail page — in compliance evidence.
discover.newsBadgeTitle: Regulator news / press announcement — not the authoritative text. Cite the linked source if it underpins a regulation.
discover.tabHintTranslated: Original is canonical · English is a machine-translation aid only
discover.tabHintExtracted: Extracted view for reading · Original for compliance evidence
discover.originalDisallowedBody: We don't cache this publisher's documents in-app. Open the canonical source on the publisher's site.
discover.originalTooLargeBody: The source document is larger than the in-app cache ceiling. Open the canonical source on the publisher's site.
discover.originalUnavailableBody: Couldn't fetch from the publisher. Try again later, or open the canonical source.
discover.originalUnavailableBodyWithError: Couldn't fetch from the publisher: {error}. Try again later, or open the canonical source.
discover.originalHtmlTitle: Source is an HTML page at the publisher's site
discover.originalHtmlBody: Regulator HTML pages (EUR-Lex, GOV.UK, ESMA, etc.) carry their own navigation, search and styling — opening them inline strips most of that. We open them in a new tab so you see the full canonical document the regulator publishes.
discover.translateNotNeeded: The source document is already in English. No translation is needed — see the Original tab.
discover.translateInProgressBody: Claude is reading the {lang} source and producing a clean English rendering. This usually takes 30–60 seconds for a regulation-length document.
discover.translateSlowNote: Larger documents take longer. Translation continues in the background — feel free to navigate elsewhere; it'll be cached when you come back.
discover.translateBackgroundNote: Translation runs in the background. If you leave this tab and come back later, the result will be cached and load instantly.
discover.translateDisclaimerEyebrow: ⚠ Machine translation — read before relying on this
discover.translateDisclaimerLead: This is a machine-generated translation from {lang} produced by an AI language model. It is offered as a navigation aid only. It is <underline>not a legally valid</underline> rendering of the source regulation.
discover.translateDisclaimerBody: Before acting on anything in this translation, you must consult an {lang}-speaking engineering or legal specialist to confirm the meaning against the original source on the Original tab. Compliance evidence, audit submissions, and regulatory citations must use the canonical {lang} document — not this translation.
discover.translateDisclaimerLiability: SparkLab LLC (intelle.io) accepts no responsibility for misinterpretations, omissions, errors, or any losses or liability arising from reliance on this AI-generated translation. The translation is provided “as is” with no warranty of any kind. Use at your own risk.
discover.tutorialsSubheading: Four narrated, interactive walkthroughs — one per top menu. Each plays section by section with a voiceover and on-screen labels; click <continue>Continue</continue> to move through each menu item at your own pace.
discover.startTutorial: Start tutorial · {count, plural, one {# section} other {# sections}}
discover.tutorialEnd: That's the end of this walkthrough.
discover.examplesComingSoonDescription: Public, indexed gallery of sample impact briefings and Iris queries (Lexis+ Protégé Prompt Library pattern). SEO + trust signal — no signup required. Phase 1 (should-have).
discover.checkupComingSoonDescription: 5–7 question public quiz that outputs a sample Feed (Watershed Regulatory Checkup pattern). Doubles as lead-gen and as the seed footprint for paid signup. Phase 1 (nice-to-have).
discover.changesComingSoonDescription: Lifecycle timeline + amendment history (Enhesa Forecaster + LexisNexis Horizon Scanning pattern). Phase 1.

widgets.regPickerSearch: Search by citation, regulator, topic, or paste a UUID…
widgets.regPickerViewTitle: Read the full regulation and pick a clause
widgets.regPickerNoMatches: No matches. Try a topic ("methane"), a regulator ("ECHA"), or paste a citation. Toggle "Show news / notices" if you're looking for an enforcement notice.
widgets.regPickerClausePlaceholder: e.g. Article 6, §261.4(b)(7), Annex IV — or click View & pick clause
widgets.regPickerClauseHint: Pin to a specific section. Leave empty to apply the whole regulation.
widgets.viewerLoadError: Couldn't load the regulation body. The corpus may be missing the source text for this item — link the whole regulation or paste the section manually below.
widgets.viewerFetchError: Could not load body from source
widgets.viewerNoBody: The corpus has no body text for this regulation. Open the source link in a new tab to read it, then paste the relevant clause text below.
widgets.viewerThinSummaryTitle: Only the regulator's short summary was ingested.
widgets.viewerThinSummaryBody: The connectors only capture metadata — not the full body — for this source today. Click below to fetch the full text from <url></url>, parse it, and cache it on this row so subsequent views load instantly.
widgets.viewerClauseTextPlaceholder: Clause text — captured from a paragraph above, or paste / edit manually.
widgets.briefingGeneratedNote: Briefing generated {ago}. Citation-grounded synthesis from {count, plural, one {# corpus source} other {# corpus sources}}. Verify every claim against the cited source before relying on it for compliance evidence.
widgets.connectorsAdminOnlyDesc: This page is restricted to organisation owners and admins.
widgets.connectorsDescription: Manually trigger any connector. Same code path as the nightly cron — fetches the publisher's index, upserts into regulatory_items, optionally rebuilds the hierarchy. Owner/admin only.
widgets.connectorsWarning: Heavy operation — runs against live regulator sites. Be mindful of rate limits. Each run takes 5–60s; some sites (ECHA) are bot-blocked and will return 0 items.

onboarding.paywallExtra: Onboarding lives inside the footprint configurator, which is Pro+ only. Sign up for free, upgrade when you're ready to set up your footprint.
onboarding.heading: Configure your operations footprint
onboarding.intro: Tells Vantage which jurisdictions, activities, and topics to prioritise. Pick as much or as little as you want — you can always refine it later from <footprintLink>Settings → Footprint</footprintLink>. The defaults are intentionally empty so you don't get scored against assumptions you didn't make.
onboarding.explore: Want to explore first? <browseLink>Browse the corpus</browseLink> or <feedLink>skip to the Feed</feedLink> — your footprint can stay empty until you're ready.

dashboardPage.subtitle: Your compliance command center — everything that needs you, at a glance.

serviceDetail.ctaIndustry: Ready to discuss your {industry} intelligence needs?
serviceDetail.ctaResearchBody: Every engagement starts with a free diagnostic call. Tell us about your research needs and we'll scope a bespoke engagement.
serviceDetail.ctaEngineeringBody: Every engagement starts with a free diagnostic call. Tell us about your engineering challenges and we'll scope a tailored solution.
serviceDetail.ctaIndustryBody: Every engagement starts with a free, no-obligation diagnostic call to identify your needs and explore how we can help.

bookPage.title: Book a free intro call
bookPage.slotParagraph: Pick a 30-minute slot that works for you. You'll get a Zoom link in your calendar invite, and we'll use the time to scope the right engagement for your needs.
bookPage.notReady: Not ready to book? <contact>Send us a message</contact> or email <mail>{email}</mail>.
bookPage.faq1A: Yes. The 30-minute discovery call is free and no-obligation. We use it to understand your decision and scope, and to confirm whether we are the right fit. If we are, you receive a written SOW within 48 hours.
bookPage.faq2Q: Do I need to prepare anything beforehand?
bookPage.faq2A: No mandatory prep. If you can describe the decision you're trying to make in 1–2 sentences and the timeline you're working against, that's plenty. The call is for understanding scope, not interviewing you.
bookPage.faq3Q: What happens after the call if we want to move forward?
bookPage.faq3A: Within 48 hours of the call we send a written Statement of Work (SOW): scope, deliverables, timeline, fixed fee. Most engagements start within 1–2 weeks of SOW signature.
bookPage.faq4Q: Will I be talking to a senior practitioner or an analyst?
bookPage.faq4A: Senior practitioner. Every discovery call and engagement is led by Arnab Ghosh (Founder & CEO) — 25+ years across S&P Global, IHS Markit, GE Energy, Accuris (a KKR portfolio company), and Sapient Consulting. SAE-published. CERAWeek-invited.
bookPage.faq5A: If the conversation needs more time we'll either extend the slot if the calendar allows, or schedule a follow-up. We don't watch the clock — but 30 minutes is usually plenty to determine fit and scope.

diagrams.dtEyebrow: How a standard reaches every system that depends on it
diagrams.dtIntro: Every design decision must trace back to a governing standard. Every revision cascades into inspections, procedures, change management, and supplier obligations. The thread is what makes that cascade automatic rather than manual.
diagrams.layer2Body: Unstructured standards become structured, citable, traceable requirement objects — each one enriched with metadata and addressable by an API.
diagrams.changeCascadeBody: When a standard or regulation is revised, the change propagates automatically through the thread — inspection plans, MOC workflows, supplier obligations, and design records all see the impact. MOC becomes proactive, not reactive. Audit conformance is a continuous system state, not a pre-inspection scramble.
diagrams.seciIntro: Engineering organisations create value when tacit expertise — held in the heads of senior engineers — moves through four modes: socialised, externalised, combined, and re-internalised. Each turn of the spiral compounds institutional capability.
diagrams.seciSocializationBullet2: War rooms, field handovers, on-the-tools learning
diagrams.seciSocializationBullet3: Communities of practice and peer-to-peer dialogue
diagrams.seciSocializationBullet4: Structured mentorship across the dual technical ladder
diagrams.seciExternalizationTagline: Articulating tacit expertise into reusable artefacts.
diagrams.seciExternalizationBullet3: Concept creation and decomposition in NPD
diagrams.seciCombinationTagline: Aggregating internal and external knowledge into new knowledge for sharing.
diagrams.seciCombinationBullet2: Knowledge-graph linkage across assets, standards, suppliers
diagrams.seciInternalizationTagline: Knowledge applied and absorbed by doing.
diagrams.seciInternalizationBullet2: Learning by doing on instrumented work
diagrams.seciInternalizationBullet3: Performance KPIs tied to knowledge reuse
diagrams.seciInternalizationBullet4: Value realisation and feedback into the spiral

insightsUi.authorBio: {name} is the Founder & CEO of {siteName}, an engineering intelligence and research-services practice based in {location}. 25+ years across S&P Global, IHS Markit, GE Energy, Accuris (a KKR portfolio company), and Sapient Consulting. SAE-published on industrial AI and cognitive operations. CERAWeek-invited speaker. Fortune 500 reference engagements with Aramco, ADNOC, Shell, Chevron, Honeywell, Baker Hughes, and GE Energy.
insightsUi.authorCta: {siteName} runs scoped research and implementation engagements. If you are weighing a decision this quarter, <link>book a discovery call</link>.

quickActions.bookACall: Book a call with the Senior Practitioner
quickActions.kmServices: Tell me about your KM services

iris.greeting: Hi — I'm Iris, the intelle.io concierge. I can answer questions about our research and implementation services, point you to the right page, or set up a 30-minute call with our Senior Practitioner. What would you like to do?
iris.errorFallback: Sorry — I hit a snag. Try again, or email hello@intelle.io.
iris.hintBody: Ask me about intelle.io services, or I can set up a call with our Senior Practitioner.
iris.disclaimer: Iris is an AI — sometimes wrong. For anything binding, please <link>book a call</link>.

bookCard.subtitle: Free · 30 minutes · led by our Senior Practitioner personally
